revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従七位]][[ko:종7위]][[zh:從七位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従七位]][[ko:종7위]][[zh:從七位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従七位]][[ko:종7위]][[zh:從七位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従七位]][[ko:종7위]][[zh:從七位]]
{{No footnotes|date=2015th year 8月}}
'''Jūshichi-i''' (従七位) is one of the {{ill|Court Ranks in Japan|ja|位階|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Court Ranks of Japan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It is positioned below {{ill|Senior Seventh Rank|ja|正七位|1=Senior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|qq=}} and above {{ill|Senior Eighth Rank|ja|正八位|1=Senior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Eighth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Eighth Rank|qq=}}.<ref>https://www.wakapoetry.net/background/society/court-offices-titles-and-Ranks/court-Ranks/</ref>
In the {{ill|Ritsuryō|en|Ritsuryō|qid=Q742460|lt=Ritsuryō system|1=Ritsuryō}}, Jūshichi-i was further divided into two subRanks: Upper Jūshichi-i (従七位上) and Lower Jūshichi-i (従七位下). During the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}, under the {{ill|Daijōkan system (Meiji period)|ja|太政官制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijōkan system (Meiji period)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太政官 (明治時代)|1=Dajōkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125768223}}, these subRanks were eliminated. Jūshichi-i corresponded to positions such as assistant scribes (少史) in the {{ill|Department of Divinities|en|Department of Divinities|qid=Q2264720|lt=Department of Divinities|1=Department of Divinities}}.
As an honor, the Rank of Jūshichi-i was conferred upon {{ill|Masamori Inoue|ja|井ノ上正盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masamori Inoue|1=Masamori Inoue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6140118}}, First Secretary of the {{ill|Embassy of Japan in Iraq|ja|在イラク日本国大使館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Embassy of Japan in Iraq|1=Embassy of Japan, Baghdad|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q63305443}}, who died in the {{ill|2003 Shooting of Japanese Diplomats in Iraq|ja|イラク日本人外交官射殺事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2003 Shooting of Japanese Diplomats in Iraq|qq=}} while on duty.<ref>[https://www.mofa.go.jp/mofaj/press/release/15/rls_1205a.html Announcement of Conferment of Ranks and Decorations for Those Killed in Iraq] (December 5, 2003), Ministry of Foreign Affairs.</ref>
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links ==
[https://laws.e-gov.go.jp/document?lawid=215IO0000000325 位階令] - {{ill|e-Gov Law Search|ja|e-Gov法令検索|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/e-Gov Law Search|qq=}} [{{NDLDC|787949/168}} 官位相当表] - National Diet Library Digital Archive

{{translated page|ja|従七位|version=103189879|comment=Imported full ja history}}
